item.dc:creator: Richard Engel
Chantal Da Silva
Matthew Mulligan
item.description: The United States launched a fresh barrage of strikes on Iran overnight as President Donald Trump threatened a major new escalation after Tehran opened a second front in its pressure campaign on the world economy.

media:content.media:text: Smoke rises from an explosion at an unknown location, during what the U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) says are strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a handout video released on July 23, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Smoke rises from an explosion at an unknown location, during what the U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) says are strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a handout video released on July 23, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Satellite Imagery Of The Bab el-Mandeb Strait
media:content.media:description: Satellite imagery of the Bab el-Mandeb Strait

media:content.media:text: A boat is targeted during U.S. strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a Central Command handout video released Thursday.
media:content.media:description: A boat is targeted during U.S. strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a Central Command handout video released Thursday.

item.title: U.S. launches new strikes and Trump threatens ‘massive attack’ as Iran widens war

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Kyle Stewart
Frank Thorp V
item.description: The House approved a nonbinding proposal to end the Iran war, directing President Donald Trump to remove armed forces from hostilities.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump salutes as members of a U.S. Army carry team move the flag-draped transfer case
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday salutes the flag-draped transfer case holding the remains of Army Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, who was killed in the war with Iran.

item.title: House votes to end Iran war, but Senate Republicans vote to let Trump continue waging it

item.description: President Trump announced new 10% to 12.5% tariffs on 60 countries over accusations of "forced labor." Those new duties will take effect at 12:01 a.m. ET on Friday morning.

media:content.media:title: President Trump announces new tariffs on dozens of countries
media:content.media:description: President Trump announced new 10% to 12.5% tariffs on 60 countries over accusations of "forced labor." Those new duties will take effect at 12:01 a.m. ET on Friday morning.

item.title: President Trump announces new tariffs on dozens of countries

item.description: Authorities say Corey Ruiz was shot and killed by a police officer in Madison, Wisconsin. Multiple videos capture the incident from different angles. After a chase and a struggle, police say Ruiz pulled out a knife. NBC News’ Shaquille Brewster reports from the scene.

media:content.media:title: Mounting frustrations over Wisconsin police shooting
media:content.media:description: Authorities say Corey Ruiz was shot and killed by a police officer in Madison, Wisconsin. Multiple videos capture the incident from different angles. After a chase and a struggle, police say Ruiz pulled out a knife. NBC News’ Shaquille Brewster reports from the scene.

item.title: Mounting frustrations over Wisconsin police shooting

item.description: Terrifying moments in New York City this afternoon when two people were stabbed near Central Park, just feet from a synagogue. Witnesses say the attacker yelled Allahu-Akbar. NBC News’ Erin McLaughlin has the latest on the investigation

media:content.media:title: Stabbings near New York City’s Central Park
media:content.media:description: Terrifying moments in New York City this afternoon when two people were stabbed near Central Park, just feet from a synagogue. Witnesses say the attacker yelled Allahu-Akbar. NBC News’ Erin McLaughlin has the latest on the investigation

item.title: Stabbings near New York City’s Central Park

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Chuck
item.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

media:content.media:text: Woman in a blue patient uniform gown sits alone on a bed in a private room and looking out the window in hospital, expressing her concern about the results of an examination. Sad patient and thinking stress anxiety with symptoms of depression and sadness,

item.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you

item.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

media:content.media:title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
media:content.media:description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

item.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Robinson
item.description: Hundreds of American diplomats and their families in the Middle East ordered to evacuate at the start of the Iran war are frustrated with a lack of answers.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump holds up a chart while speaking during a “Make America Wealthy Again” trade announcement event in the Rose Garden at the White House on April 2, 2025 in Washington, D.C.

media:content.media:text: Illustration of a young family; next to a collage of the US Embassy in Tel Aviv with red stars and stripes.
Frankford Arsenal, South of Tacony Street between Bridge Street & tracks of former Pennsylvania Railroad, in Philadelphia.
media:content.media:description: Frankford Arsenal, South of Tacony Street between Bridge Street & tracks of former Pennsylvania Railroad, in Philadelphia.

item.title: New tariffs on U.S. trade partners and experts divided on OpenAI hack: Morning Rundown

item.dc:creator: Richard Engel
Chantal Da Silva
Matthew Mulligan
item.description: The United States launched a fresh barrage of strikes on Iran overnight as President Donald Trump threatened a major new escalation after Tehran opened a second front in its pressure campaign on the world economy.

media:content.media:text: Smoke rises from an explosion at an unknown location, during what the U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) says are strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a handout video released on July 23, 2026.

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
Sara G. Miller
item.description: The panel went against the conclusions of the agency’s career scientists, who said there wasn’t enough evidence to support the move.

media:content.media:text: Food And Drug Administration Headquarters In Maryland
media:content.media:description: The Food and Drug Administration headquarters in White Oak, Md.

item.title: FDA panel recommends easing restrictions on several peptides

item.dc:creator: Allan Smith
item.description: Speaking with NBC News’ “Here’s the Scoop,” Hochul said that she’s responding to the concerns of localities and that New York doesn’t need data centers to support the AI boom.

media:content.media:text: Gov. Kathy Hochul
media:content.media:description: Gov. Kathy Hochul speaks at a roundtable discussion about her recent executive order establishing a moratorium on data centers in New York state last week.

media:content.media:text: tu051226_datacenters advocates
media:content.media:description: Gov. Kathy Hochul speaks at a roundtable discussion about her recent executive order establishing a moratorium on data centers in New York state last week.

item.title: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul explains why she signed the first statewide moratorium on data centers

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
Cory Fernandez
item.description: We found the best dorm essentials to get this year, including bedding, organizers, decor, tech, supplies and much more.

media:content.media:text: You can get some of the best dorm essentials at great prices from Amazon, Target, Walmart and more.

item.title: The 33 best dorm essentials to make the school year go smoothly — at least as your room is concerned

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Deodorant concealer can temporarily hide dark underarms, but dermatologists warn that it may irritate skin or mask deeper issues. Here’s what to know before you try it.

media:content.media:text: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.
media:content.media:description: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.

media:content.media:text: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.
media:content.media:description: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.

item.title: What is deodorant concealer and is the viral product safe? Derms weigh in

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Walmart has the Dyson V8 Absolute Cordless Vacuum marked down to just under $300 — a rare discount on a Dyson vacuum. Here’s why shoppers love it.

media:content.media:text: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.
media:content.media:description: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.

media:content.media:text: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.
media:content.media:description: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.

item.title: This popular Dyson vacuum is $290 off at Walmart right now — get it before the price goes back up

item.dc:creator: Ashley Morris
item.description: During the Macy’s Black Friday in July sale you can save on skin care, apparel, fragrance, appliances and more.

media:content.media:text: The Macy’s Black Friday in July Sale runs through July 24 and includes deals across categories.

item.title: Macy’s Black Friday in July sale — save up to 70% on bestselling brands

item.dc:creator: Adam Reiss
Alexandra Marquez
item.description: A judge repeatedly questioned why prosecutors had issued the subpoenas before pursuing alternative investigative steps.

media:content.media:text: Front of the The New York Times building in New York City.
media:content.media:description: The Justice Department subpoenaed four New York Times reporters after they reported on security concerns with the new Air Force One.

item.title: Justice Department agrees to withdraw subpoenas of New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
